items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Parts ordering with ETA' requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or confirmations regarding parts ordering or estimated time of arrival (ETA). The linked use case mentions the need for parts ordering but lacks concrete evidence to confirm that this requirement has been satisfied.
